data.body: OBSOLETED by the retire-auto-lander migration (epic d4de / retire-code story d0e5): the owner decided (2026-07-13) to drop the bot entirely and land via Gerrit Rebase-If-Necessary + agent Submit. The code carrying this bug (infra/autolander/) is being DELETED, which is this bug's resolution. Close this as obsolete when d0e5 lands; no separate fix will be written.
